---
title: "What is that supposed to be - reproducible research?"
id: material-gis-reproducible-research-intro
order: 300
summary: "Definition of reproducible research tools and workflows."
source_url: "https://www.earthdatascience.org/courses/intro-to-earth-data-science/open-reproducible-science/get-started-open-reproducible-science/"
modules:
  - gis-reproducible-research
Goals: []
activities: []
assessments: []
labels:
  - basic
  - mandatory
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/gis-reproducible-research/material-gis-reproducible-research-intro.md"
---

Read the introduction to open reproducible science:

<iframe
  src="https://earthdatascience.org/courses/intro-to-earth-data-science/open-reproducible-science/get-started-open-reproducible-science/"
  width="100%"
  height="90%"
  style="border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade">
</iframe>

## Connected Module

- [Reproducible Research](../modules/gis-reproducible-research.qmd)
